title: Jungle Lodges Karnataka Global Group is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Jungle Lodges Karnataka Global Group is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Jungle Lodges Karnataka Global Group is actively seeking a talented and motivated Guest Relations Manager to join our dynamic team in Visakhapatnam. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Jungle Lodges Karnataka Global Group:
Jungle Lodges Karnataka Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Yield Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jungle Lodges Karnataka Global Group!
